text.title: VUI Market Context Worked Example
text.summary: End-to-end example: a smart-speaker product targeting US + EU runs the pipeline and produces a publishable brief.

section.title: Example: US + EU smart-speaker brief

example.code:
# VUI Market Context — US + EU Smart Speaker Q2 2026
_Refreshed: 2026-05-23. Model: claude-opus-4-7._
## Adoption stats (sourced)
| Metric | Value | Year | Geo | Denominator | Source | |--------|-------|------|-----|-------------|--------| | Smart-speaker household penetration | 55% | 2025 | US | smart-speaker-households | edisonresearch.com | | Smart-speaker household penetration | 38% | 2025 | EU-5 | smart-speaker-households | statista.com | | US adults using voice assistant | 62% | 2025 | US | voice-assistant-users | pewresearch.org | | Voice-search share of internet queries | 20% | 2025 | global | voice-search-query-share | statista.com |
## Platform comparison (per geo)
| Platform | US reach | EU-5 reach | SDK health | |----------|----------|-----------|------------| | Alexa | 70% smart-speaker share | 35% smart-speaker share | maintained | | Google Assistant | 20% smart-speaker share | 45% smart-speaker share | maintained | | Siri | 95% iOS install base | 95% iOS install base | maintained | | Bixby | <2% | <2% | maintained | | Custom LLM-VUI | any device with API | any device with API | active |
## Recommendation
Target both Alexa (US) and Google Assistant (EU-5) for skill-store reach; ship a Custom LLM-VUI fallback for open-domain dialog. Avoid Bixby outside KR. Re-validate when refreshed_at > 90 days from today.

section.note: The brief never claims a number without geo + source + denominator. Custom LLM-VUI appears as a peer category, not a sub-bullet of Alexa.
